sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 62

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 62:1
items.html: (to the question) For in the first Zivug [coupling] only her Kelim [vessels] were completed, and for the Lights she needs a second Zivug, as is known. Therefore, since she still lacks the Lights of Gadlut, she can clothe him only at his back. (Item 109)
